description.ko: 해저의 압도적인 깊이 속에서 투명한 생명체들이 유일한 빛이 되어주는 자정 구역의 평온한 탐사입니다.
description.en: A serene exploration of the midnight zone, where transparent life forms provide the only light in the crushing depths of the sea.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Aurora.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent jellyfish with trailing #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsates around #006994 deep-sea mineral vents. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow that catches the soft glow of the organisms. Photorealistic fluid dynamics and volumetric light rays filter through the high-pressure currents. Focus on the transparent, fragile grace of deep-sea life against the absolute darkness. 8k resolution, capturing the peaceful dance of the trenches.
